General.Name: Mg Internation
General.Description: MG International S.A. manufactures and sells swimming pool safety and maintenance equipment in France, Europe, and internationally. It offers cleaning robots, pool covers, swimming pool alarms, pool cleaning, and spare parts, such as Maytronics, Précisio, Aqualarm, Aquasensor, Oxineo and Sysne, Aqua Life, and Espio alarms, as well as maintenance contracts like Dolphin Service. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in La Ciotat, France. MG International S.A. is a subsidiary of Maytronics Ltd.
General.Address: 163 avenue des Tamaris, La Ciotat, France, 13600
